steps.assistant_text: Event-counter dispatcher, 96.2%->exact. (1) Per-region pointer locals pa..pf replacing one shared p — the single p's web was CONSTRAINED out of $v0 (uoptlist: assigned constrained 2 = v1); short call-free webs let every region color v0. 34->4 diffs. (2) if(1) BB-barriers on defs following a call in the same BB (same-BB-call v0 eviction) x4 sites. (3) Counter locals removed (direct *(int*)(arg0+0xD8) += 1) -> pure t-temps with CSE reload fold. (4) Tail pf = *(char**)(arg0+0x78) + 0x18 RMW reproduces lw/addiu/sw advance. (5) TYPE-RECOVERY SIGNAL: li a2,0 (not move a2,zero) = float 0.0f third arg to a PROTOTYPED (int,int,float) callee — O32 passes raw bits in a2; overturns the 'as1 tie not C-flippable' doc entry.
